title: The capture of Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi, dressed in woman's clothing, in the streets of Baghdad; Ibrahim 's ode addressed to al-Ma'mun seeking the Caliph 's forgiveness
description: The capture of Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi, dressed in woman's clothing, in the streets of Baghdad; Ibrahim 's ode addressed to al-Ma'mun seeking the Caliph 's forgiveness. Recorded under the year 210 AH (825–826 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
